message:
fix(clippy): resolve 28 derivable-impl and misc clippy warnings

- Replace 16 manual impl Default blocks with #[derive(Default)]
- Collapse nested if statements in replay_counterfactual/provenance
- Remove unnecessary let bindings in latency_stages/sliding_window
- Replace useless format!() in replay_shadow_rollout
- Generalize HashMap parameter in runtime_health

Reduces clippy warning count from 44 to 16 (remaining are
too_many_arguments which require structural refactoring).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
